name: Jen Kirkman
blurb: She has released two Netflix stand-up specials and is a New York Times bestselling author.
bio: Jen Kirkman is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and podcaster who was a longtime roundtable panelist on Chelsea Lately and wrote for The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel. She has released two Netflix stand-up specials and is a New York Times bestselling author.

timeline.ev: Joins Chelsea Lately as a roundtable panelist
Publishes the bestseller I Can Barely Take Care of Myself
Releases Netflix special Im Gonna Die Alone (And I Feel Fine)
Releases second Netflix special Just Keep Livin and writes for Mrs. Maisel

accolades: Netflix stand-up special, Im Gonna Die Alone (And I Feel Fine) (2015)
Netflix stand-up special, Just Keep Livin (2017)
Writer on The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel
